title: NYCT Stop Markers and Conductor's Boards
description: A Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR4) resource pack that adds MTA NYCT car stop markers and conductor's boards.
body:
This pack uses the Decoration Object block to add NYCT MTA-style stop markers and conductor's boards to Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR4). To use, place the Decoration Object block, right-click it with a brush, and then select the appropriate conductor's board/stop marker that you're looking for. You will need to experiment with the positioning to get it just right.

Included in the pack are:
- 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, and 10 car stop markers (along with S and OPTO S)
- Unlabeled conductor's boards (single and double-sided)
- R40/R42 conductor's boards (single and double-sided)
